Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) Name for the media workflow.
  • tasks - (Optional) (Updatable) The ordered workflow task definitions.
  • media_workflow_configuration_ids - (Optional) (Updatable) Media workflow configuration identifiers applied to this workflow.
  • parameters - (Optional) (Updatable) Named workflow parameters.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • locks - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
